description: A designed Ready.gov / Energy Saver '#WinterReady' preparedness graphic in landscape format. The background is an illustrated winter scene: light and dark blue stylized mountains, a white snowdrift along the bottom, and scattered falling-snow dots across a blue sky. Centered is a circular photo vignette (ringed in dark blue) showing a small wooden model house wearing a gray knit pom-pom beanie and wrapped in a chunky red knit scarf, evoking a 'cozy, insulated home.' Top-right shows two white logos: 'energy saver' (with a house/plug icon) and 'Ready' (with a checkmark). Below the photo, a dark navy banner holds white text: 'Keep your house warm this season with insulation, caulking, and weather stripping!' At the bottom is the campaign hashtag wordmark '#WINTERREADY' in green and dark-blue letters with dripping-icicle accents. The messaging is a friendly seasonal home-energy/winterization PSA. Target audience: general public/homeowners. Not immigration-related.
notable_text: Keep your house warm this season with insulation, caulking, and weather stripping!; #WINTERREADY; energy saver; Ready
